repair_history.diagnosis:
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE references component implementation properties using the component type name, not the implementation name -> Change 'Task.impl_1.Period' to 'Task.Period'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_Time'.: AGREE references component implementation properties using the component type name, not the implementation name -> Change 'Task.impl_1.Compute_Execution_Time' to 'Task.Compute_Execution_Time'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE references component implementation properties using the component type name, not the implementation name -> Change 'Task.impl_1.Dispatch_Protocol' to 'Task.Dispatch_Protocol'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE references component implementation properties using the component type name, not the implementation name -> Change 'Task.impl_1.Priority' to 'Task.Priority'
no viable alternative at input '"Periodic"': AGREE string literals are not supported for property comparisons; must use property values directly -> Change '"Periodic"' to 'Periodic'

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex references component properties using the wrong scope -> Change 'Task.Period' to 'Task.impl_1.Period'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE annex references component properties using the wrong scope -> Change 'Task.Compute_Execution_time' to 'Task.impl_1.Compute_Execution_time'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE annex references component properties using the wrong scope -> Change 'Task.Dispatch_Protocol' to 'Task.impl_1.Dispatch_Protocol'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE annex references component properties using the wrong scope -> Change 'Task.Priority' to 'Task.impl_1.Priority'

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type to implementation -> Remove the period_constraint guarantee
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type to implementation -> Remove the execution_time_constraint guarantee
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type to implementation -> Remove the dispatch_protocol_constraint guarantee
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type to implementation -> Remove the priority_constraint guarantee

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE cannot resolve property reference in component type scope -> Remove reference to 'Period' property in AGREE annex
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE cannot resolve property reference in component type scope -> Remove reference to 'Compute_Execution_time' property in AGREE annex
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE cannot resolve property reference in component type scope -> Remove reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol' property in AGREE annex
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE cannot resolve property reference in component type scope -> Remove reference to 'Priority' property in AGREE annex
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: AGREE cannot resolve property reference in component type scope -> Remove property reference in AGREE annex
Byte_Count (property association) does not point to anything: Unresolved property reference in annex -> Remove or replace undefined property references in AGREE annex
